prompt:
Declaration (in prose format):

A distributed ralph loop. 6 implementer agents on sonnet-4.6 plus 1 reviewer on opus-4.7, max 2 agents per repo to avoid file-lock thrash, pull tasks from fix_plan.md in github.com/lambda-run/ops. Each agent claims via atomic branch lock with 10m TTL; release on merge, abandon, or TTL expiry. Conflicts resolve last-write-wins after rebase; 3 rebase conflicts escalates a task to the reviewer pool. Gossip claim, merge, and block events to slack:#ralph-bus. Loop continues while backlog has open tasks; stops on budget > $50, kill switch, or error rate > 30%. On worker crash, release claims and requeue with retry++; after 3 retries park for human. Log claim/commit/fail events to loki; track success rate, p50 task seconds, claim contention; surface to human when error rate > 20% or queue stuck > 30m. Terminate on backlog empty, budget exhausted, or human signals done.

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
• 6 implementer agents instantiated
• 1 reviewer agent instantiated
• Implementer agents run on claude-sonnet-4.6
• Reviewer agent runs on claude-opus-4.7
• Maximum 2 agents assigned per repository at any time
• Task source file: fix_plan.md
• Task source repository: github.com/lambda-run/ops
• Agents pull tasks from fix_plan.md
• Task claiming mechanism: atomic branch lock
• Branch lock TTL: 10 minutes
• Lock released on successful merge
• Lock released on task abandonment
• Lock released on TTL expiry
• Conflict resolution strategy: last-write-wins after rebase
• Rebase conflict threshold for escalation: 3 conflicts on a single task
• Tasks exceeding 3 rebase conflicts escalated to reviewer pool
• Reviewer pool receives escalated tasks
• Gossip events published to Slack channel: #ralph-bus
• Gossip event type: claim
• Gossip event type: merge
• Gossip event type: block
• Loop continues while backlog contains open tasks
• Loop stops when cumulative budget exceeds $50
• Loop stops when kill switch is activated
• Loop stops when error rate exceeds 30%
• On worker crash: all claims held by that worker are released
• On worker crash: released tasks are requeued
• Requeued tasks have retry counter incremented by 1
• Tasks with retry count reaching 3 are parked for human review
• Claim events logged to Loki
• Commit events logged to Loki
• Fail events logged to Loki
• Metric tracked: success rate
• Metric tracked: p50 task duration in seconds
• Metric tracked: claim contention
• Alert to human when error rate exceeds 20%
• Alert to human when queue is stuck for more than 30 minutes
• Loop terminates when backlog is empty
• Loop terminates when budget is exhausted
• Loop terminates when human signals done
• Each task carries a retry counter
• Tasks parked for human after 3 failed retries
• File-lock thrash prevention enforced via 2-agent-per-repo cap
• Agents rebase before applying last-write-wins resolution
